message:
chore: resync workspace Cargo.lock for fuzz term dep + sync beads tracking state

Cargo.lock: add frankenterm-term as a dependency of the fuzz crate.
The actual fuzz/Cargo.toml change landed earlier in 168d379a
("ft-btg0h add term advance_bytes fuzz target") which added a new
harness hitting the full escape-to-state pipeline at
frankenterm/term/src/terminal.rs:164 (Terminal::advance_bytes). The
Cargo.toml manifest was committed at that point but the lockfile
didn't get checked in alongside it, so until now `cargo fuzz run
term_advance_bytes` on a fresh clone would fail the resolver step.
This commit is a pure `cargo update -p frankenterm-fuzz` catch-up
— single line added, no version bumps, no new transitive pulls.

.beads/issues.jsonl: miscellaneous tracking updates across several
issues (ft-0s1os, ft-djpi3, ft-eze48, and neighbours). Net diff is
9 lines added / 7 removed, with no issue-row deletions — every
modification is a status/timestamp/assignee change on an existing
issue. No closures marked here that would drop a referenced bug
from the queue, and no re-open of previously-closed issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
